caption: The video appears to be a news segment featuring a political event or discussion. The main focus is on two individuals seated next to each other, with one of them clapping his hands, possibly in response to a speech or announcement. The text overlay in Hindi indicates that the content is related to a political figure named Nitesh Kumar and mentions Tejashwi's "Siddhi Dhamki," suggesting a significant political development or statement. The presence of other political figures in smaller frames on the right side of the screen further emphasizes the political context of the event. The overall setting seems formal, likely a press conference or a public gathering, with the time displayed as 10:02 PM, indicating it might be an evening broadcast.
